name: card-collection
description: A gallery of cards that is state-complete by construction: card-shaped skeletons, an empty slot, error + retry and a result-count announcement. You only write the card.

notes: Renders a labelled role=list with role=listitem cards
Announces the result count via the StateBoundary live region
Loading skeleton cards are aria-hidden and aria-busy

intents: render a grid or gallery of fetched items with loading and empty states
card grid with skeletons and retry
photo or product gallery that handles all async states
